description.value: Obligations for the logical model for patient summary.

short.value: Patient summary model

definition.value: The model is a structured document designed to provide an overview of a patient’s most important health information. The model aims to be compatible with the ISO International Patient Summary standard.

short.value: Document header

definition.value: Basic metadata for this information

short.value: Patient/subject information

definition.value: Patient/subject information

short.value: Unique identifier of the document

definition.value: Business identifier for the object, unique within its system. Supporting disambiguation between different contexts (systems/countries).

short.value: Author(s) of the document

definition.value: Author(s) responsible for the provided information. The exact role of the responsible author varies across use cases and is specific to individual models.

short.value: Date of finalising/issuing the document

definition.value: Date and optionally time of authoring/issuing

short.value: Status of the document

definition.value: Status of the resource or document

short.value: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.

definition.value: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.

short.value: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.

definition.value: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.

short.value: Type of document at hand, e.g. 60591-5 Patient summary document.

definition.value: Type of document at hand, e.g. 60591-5 Patient summary document.

short.value: Human readable document title that can be displayed in search results, etc. This can be documentType's display name, or it can be assembled from multiple elements. Examples: 'Laboratory Result Report', 'Patient Summary of Jane Green 10.12.2024'

definition.value: Human readable document title that can be displayed in search results, etc. This can be documentType's display name, or it can be assembled from multiple elements. Examples: 'Laboratory Result Report', 'Patient Summary of Jane Green 10.12.2024'

short.value: Time period of information covered in the document

definition.value: Time period of information covered in the document

short.value: Business version of the document. The exact algorithm for versioning is decided by the producer/custodian

definition.value: Business version of the document. The exact algorithm for versioning is decided by the producer/custodian

short.value: Document attestation details

definition.value: Document attestation details

short.value: Attester who validated the document

definition.value: Attester who validated the document

short.value: Date and time of the approval of the document by Attester

definition.value: Date and time of the approval of the document by Attester

short.value: Document legal authentication details

definition.value: Document legal authentication details

short.value: The person or organisation taking responsibility for the content of the document.

definition.value: The person or organisation taking responsibility for the content of the document.

short.value: Date and time when the document was authorised

definition.value: Date and time when the document was authorised

short.value: Categorisation of the event covered by the document (e.g. laboratory study types, imaging study types including modality, etc.). Selection of such tags or labels depends on the use case and agreement between data sharing parties. This meta-data element serves primarily for searching and filtering purposes.

definition.value: Categorisation of the event covered by the document (e.g. laboratory study types, imaging study types including modality, etc.). Selection of such tags or labels depends on the use case and agreement between data sharing parties. This meta-data element serves primarily for searching and filtering purposes.

short.value: Additional details about where the content was created (e.g. clinical specialty)

definition.value: Additional details about where the content was created (e.g. clinical specialty)

short.value: Organisation that is in charge of maintaining the document/report.

definition.value: Organisation that is in charge of maintaining the document/report.

short.value: A narrative easy-to-read representation of the full data set, e.g. PDF-version of a document

definition.value: A narrative easy-to-read representation of the full data set, e.g. PDF-version of a document

short.value: Section: Alerts

definition.value: Substantial alerts or warnings that health professionals should be aware of.

requirements.value: eHN PS Guideline, MyHealth@EU, ISO IPS

valueMarkdown.value: System shall be able to populate generatedNarrative if the structured content is not supported by the system.
System shall display generatedNarrative if the structured content is not supported by the system.

short.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

definition.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

short.value: Description of medical alerts in textual format: any clinical information that is imperative to know so that the life or health of the patient does not come under threat.

definition.value: Description of medical alerts in textual format: any clinical information that is imperative to know so that the life or health of the patient does not come under threat.

short.value: Free text notes by the health professional

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional

short.value: Section: Allergies and intolerances

definition.value: Section: Allergies and intolerances

requirements.value: eHN PS Guideline, MyHealth@EU, ISO IPS

short.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

definition.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

short.value: List of structured allergies and intolerances

definition.value: List of structured allergies and intolerances

requirements.value: eHN PS Guideline, MyHealth@EU, ISO IPS

short.value: Use if no Allergies are listed

definition.value: Reason for absence of data (indicates whether the person is known to have no allergies or the data is considered incomplete)

requirements.value: This element is present in MyHealth@EU specifications and ISO IPS. The proposed way of modelling is identical to the newest version of FHIR IPS IG. See general description of Patient summary modelling for more information about this element. MH@EU has a similar concept, but it is modelled in slightly different way.

short.value: Free text notes by the health professional

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional

short.value: Section: Medical problems

definition.value: Conditions and symptoms affecting the health of the patient.

short.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

definition.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

short.value: Use if no conditions are listed

definition.value: Use if no conditions are listed

short.value: Health conditions affecting the health of the patient.

definition.value: Health conditions affecting the health of the patient.

short.value: Free text notes by the health professional

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional

short.value: Section: Medication summary

definition.value: Current and relevant past medicines.

short.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

definition.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

short.value: Use if no medicines are listed

definition.value: Use if no medicines are listed

short.value: Medication treatment/prescription relevant for this patient summary. Typically, medications whose period of time indicated for the treatment has not yet expired whether it has been dispensed or not.

definition.value: Medication treatment/prescription relevant for this patient summary. Typically, medications whose period of time indicated for the treatment has not yet expired whether it has been dispensed or not.

short.value: Free text notes by the health professional

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional

short.value: Section: Medical devices and implants

definition.value: The devices that are implanted in the patient and external medical devices and equipment that the health status depends on.

short.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

definition.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

short.value: Use if no conditions are listed

definition.value: Use if no conditions are listed

short.value: Describes the patient's implanted and external medical devices and equipment that their health status depends on. Includes devices (such as cardiac pacemakers, implantable defibrillator, prothesis, ferromagnetic bone implants etc.) that are important to know by the HP.

definition.value: Describes the patient's implanted and external medical devices and equipment that their health status depends on. Includes devices (such as cardiac pacemakers, implantable defibrillator, prothesis, ferromagnetic bone implants etc.) that are important to know by the HP.

short.value: Free text notes by the health professional

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional

short.value: Section: Procedures

definition.value: Significant procedures performed on the patient.

short.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

definition.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

short.value: Reason for absence of data

definition.value: Reason for absence of data

short.value: List of procedures

definition.value: List of procedures

short.value: Free text notes by the health professional

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional

short.value: Section: Immunisations

definition.value: A patient's immunisation status (vaccination and other prophylaxis). The section should include current immunisation status and may contain the entire history that is relevant to the period of time being summarised. Adverse reactions against vaccines should be documented in the allergy section.

short.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

definition.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

short.value: Immunisations given to the patient and their status at the point of care.

definition.value: Immunisations given to the patient and their status at the point of care.

short.value: Free text notes by the health professional

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional

short.value: Section: Functional status

definition.value: An individual's ability to perform normal daily activities required to meet basic needs, fulfil usual roles and maintain health and well-being.

requirements.value: eHN PS Guideline, MyHealth@EU, ISO IPS

short.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

definition.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

short.value: Condition information describing patient's functional status or disability.

definition.value: Condition information describing patient's functional status or disability.

short.value: Assessment results regarding functional status.

definition.value: Assessment results regarding functional status.

short.value: Free text notes by the health professional

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional

short.value: Section: Social history

definition.value: Observations on social factors such as alcohol consumption or smoking. From the healthcare perspective, life-style factors relate to well-being but can also provide a source of risk factors.

requirements.value: eHN PS Guideline, MyHealth@EU, ISO IPS

short.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

definition.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

short.value: Social history observations related to health

definition.value: Health related lifestyle factors or lifestyle observations and social determinants of health. Example: cigarette smoker, alcohol consumption

requirements.value: eHN PS Guideline, MyHealth@EU, ISO IPS

short.value: Free text notes by the health professional

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional

short.value: Section: Pregnancy history

definition.value: To present the current health state of the patient with respect to pregnancy and to provide chronological and outcome information about past pregnancies.

short.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

definition.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

short.value: Current pregnancy status

definition.value: Current state of the pregnancy at the date the observation was made, e.g. pregnant, not pregnant, unknown.

short.value: History of previous pregnancies

definition.value: Information about previous pregnancies, including outcomes and number of children/fetuses in each pregnancy.

short.value: Free text notes by the health professional

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional

short.value: Section: Travel history

definition.value: Captures relevant information about the patient's recent travel history that may be of clinical relevance — particularly in relation to exposure to infectious diseases, epidemiological risks, or environmental factors. The intent is to support clinical decision-making and risk assessment, especially in contexts such as outbreaks or endemic disease regions.

short.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

definition.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

short.value: Travel history for one country

definition.value: Travel history for one country

short.value: Free text notes by the health professional

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional

short.value: Section: Patient story

definition.value: A concise narrative from the patient’s perspective about their present health state. This is a record of things that a person feels are important to communicate about their needs, strengths, values, concerns and preferences to others providing support and care.

short.value: Free text notes by the health professional

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional

short.value: Section: Advance Directives

definition.value: Provision for healthcare decisions if, in the future, a person is unable to make those decisions.

short.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

definition.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

short.value: Provision for healthcare decisions if, in the future, a person is unable to make those decisions

definition.value: Provision for healthcare decisions if, in the future, a person is unable to make those decisions

short.value: Free text notes by the health professional

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional

short.value: Section: Observation results

definition.value: Relevant observation results obtained on the patient. These may be measurements, laboratory results, anatomic pathology results, radiology results or other imaging or clinical results.

short.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

definition.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

short.value: Observation results pertaining to the subject of care's health condition and which might have impact on future treatments

definition.value: Observation results pertaining to the subject of care's health condition and which might have impact on future treatments

short.value: Free text notes by the health professional

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional

short.value: Section: Care plans

definition.value: Therapeutic recommendations that do not include pharmacologic treatments, such as diet, physical exercise, planned surgeries

short.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

definition.value: Narrative, potentially formatted, content of the whole section.

short.value: Describes the intention of how one or more practitioners intend to deliver care for a particular patient for a period of time, possibly limited to care for a specific condition or set of conditions.

definition.value: Describes the intention of how one or more practitioners intend to deliver care for a particular patient for a period of time, possibly limited to care for a specific condition or set of conditions.

definition.value: Free text notes by the health professional
